title: Lesson 05: Counting 1 to 5
description: Master the first five numbers in Pashto and learn how they interact with objects.
author: Poha Editorial

content.heading: Using Numbers with Nouns
lines: When using numbers, the number always comes before the noun, just like in English.

content.text: Grammar Hack: Pluralizing nouns in Pashto can be complex depending on gender and endings. But as a beginner, simply placing a number higher than one before the singular noun will be universally understood by native speakers!

content.question: What is the Pashto word for the number 'Three'?
